popup.streak_reward.body,Go to Lobby to claim your Streak Challenge reward.,로비로 이동하여 연속 챌린지 보상을 받으세요.,前往大厅领取连续挑战奖励。,前往大廳領取連續挑戰獎勵。,ไปที่ล็อบบี้เพื่อรับรางวัลการท้าทายต่อเนื่อง

item.obstacle_remover.desc,Highlight obstacle cells on the board and remove one by tapping it.,보드의 장애물 셀을 하이라이트하고 탭하여 하나를 제거합니다.,高亮棋盘上的障碍格，点击即可移除一个。,高亮棋盤上的障礙格，點擊即可移除一個。,ไฮไลท์เซลล์อุปสรรคบนบอร์ดและแตะเพื่อลบออกหนึ่งเซลล์
item.node_pair_eraser.desc,Highlight all nodes on the board and remove one pair by tapping a node.,보드의 모든 노드를 하이라이트하고 탭하여 노드 쌍 하나를 제거합니다.,高亮棋盘上所有节点，点击即可移除一对节点。,高亮棋盤上所有節點，點擊即可移除一對節點。,ไฮไลท์โหนดทั้งหมดบนบอร์ดและแตะเพื่อลบคู่โหนดหนึ่งคู่
item.move_reducer.desc,Reduces your current move count by 3. Cannot be used if moves used is less than 3.,현재 이동 횟수를 3만큼 줄입니다. 이동 횟수가 3 미만이면 사용할 수 없습니다.,将当前移动次数减少3次。移动次数不足3次时无法使用。,將目前移動次數減少3次。移動次數少於3次時無法使用。,ลดจำนวนการเคลื่อนที่ปัจจุบัน 3 ครั้ง ไม่สามารถใช้ได้หากน้อยกว่า 3
item.time_extender.desc,Adds 20 seconds to the remaining time.,남은 시간에 20초를 추가합니다.,为剩余时间增加20秒。,為剩餘時間增加20秒。,เพิ่ม 20 วินาทีให้กับเวลาที่เหลืออยู่

files.data/string/error_messages:
errorCode,ko,en
NETWORK_UNAVAILABLE,Network is not initialized.,Network is not initialized.
HTTP_FAILED,Network request failed.,Network request failed.
DESERIALIZE_FAILED,Server response could not be read.,Server response could not be read.
AUTH_FAILED,Authentication failed.,Authentication failed.
SESSION_EXPIRED,Your session has expired.,Your session has expired.
AUTH_PROVIDER_TOKEN_MISSING,Provider sign-in token is missing.,Provider sign-in token is missing.
PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE,This sign-in provider is not available yet.,This sign-in provider is not available yet.
INVALID_REQUEST,Invalid authentication request.,Invalid authentication request.
INVALID_CREDENTIALS,Invalid credentials.,Invalid credentials.
TOKEN_EXPIRED,Your session has expired.,Your session has expired.
TOKEN_REVOKED,Your session has been revoked.,Your session has been revoked.
TOKEN_REUSE_DETECTED,Please sign in again.,Please sign in again.
ACCOUNT_LOCKED,This account is locked.,This account is locked.
ACCOUNT_BANNED,This account is banned.,This account is banned.
PROVIDER_TOKEN_INVALID,Provider sign-in failed.,Provider sign-in failed.
SIGNING_KEY_UNAVAILABLE,Authentication is temporarily unavailable.,Authentication is temporarily unavailable.
INSUFFICIENT_STAMINA,스태미나가 부족합니다.,Insufficient stamina.
INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS,재화가 부족합니다.,Insufficient currency.
INSUFFICIENT_INVENTORY,아이템 보유 수량이 부족합니다.,Insufficient item quantity.
STAGE_SESSION_NOT_FOUND,진행 중인 스테이지를 찾을 수 없습니다.,No active stage session found.
STAGE_ALREADY_ACTIVE,이미 진행 중인 스테이지가 있습니다.,A stage is already in progress.
STAGE_ALREADY_LOCKED,스테이지 준비가 이미 완료되었습니다.,Stage setup is already locked.
STAGE_NOT_IN_SETUP_PHASE,아이템 사용 가능 단계가 지났습니다.,Stage setup phase has ended.
STAGE_NOT_FOUND,스테이지 정보를 찾을 수 없습니다.,Stage not found.
AD_TOKEN_ALREADY_USED,이미 사용된 광고 보상입니다.,Ad reward already claimed.
INVALID_STAGE_RESULT,올바르지 않은 스테이지 결과입니다.,Invalid stage result value.
STREAK_EVENT_UNAVAILABLE,스트릭 이벤트를 사용할 수 없습니다.,Streak event is not available.
STREAK_NO_LEVELS,이벤트 레벨 설정이 없습니다.,No levels configured for this event.
STREAK_EVENT_INACTIVE,스트릭 이벤트가 활성화되지 않았습니다.,Streak challenge is not active.
STREAK_INVALID_LEVEL,올바르지 않은 레벨입니다.,Invalid level index.
STREAK_METADATA_UNAVAILABLE,스트릭 메타데이터를 불러올 수 없습니다.,Streak metadata could not be loaded.
STREAK_REWARD_NOT_PENDING,수령 가능한 보상이 없습니다.,No reward is pending for this level.
STREAK_AD_ALREADY_USED,이미 광고 보상을 받았습니다.,Ad reward already used for this level.
STAMINA_ALREADY_FULL,스태미나가 이미 최대입니다.,Stamina is already full.
SHOP_ITEM_NOT_FOUND,상품을 찾을 수 없습니다.,Shop product not found.
CONCURRENT_MODIFICATION,다른 요청과 충돌이 발생했습니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도해 주세요.,Concurrent modification conflict. Please try again.
RATE_LIMITED,요청이 너무 많습니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도해 주세요.,Too many requests. Please try again later.
INTERNAL_ERROR,서버 오류가 발생했습니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도해 주세요.,An internal server error occurred.
